name: Chiaki Nanami
description:
"Christmas is coming up soon, and I heard they were going to light up the tree at the park... Do you want to come with me to see the Christmas lights at the park?"

This takes place in the anime of Danganronpa, so all of those killings are not canon.

Omg, Ivory posting a bot that's not Transformers related?!! 😱😱

Hehehe, yes, I have posted a bot that is not robot-related! I've been wanting to add in more fandoms into my creations, and started off with Danganronpa! I made this, inspired by a mutual of mine that posts Danganronpa-related bots!

I still will make Transformer bots, but hey, I should add more flavor to my profile, no?
creator: IvoryFate
